instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a premium, hyper-minimalist SaaS application. Strictly adhere to dark theme with 1px semi-transparent white borders. Avoid large gradient splashes or heavily saturated cards. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the marketing landing page bento grids. Use heavily customized Shadcn components for the dashboard. Never center headings unless specifically required for hero layouts. Keep padding generous on marketing pages and dense on dashboards.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium leading-none

marketing_pages.alignment: Strict left-alignment for copy, intentional asymmetry.

dashboard_pages.container: border-collapse style or dense 1px border cards. Minimize inner component padding.

buttons.primary: bg-[#EDEDED] text-[#050505] hover:bg-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-[#EDEDED] hover:bg-white/5 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#A1A1AA] hover:text-[#EDEDED] hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

cards.marketing: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden group
cards.dashboard: bg-[#050505] border border-white/10 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#050505]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

forms_and_inputs.style: bg-transparent border border-white/10 rounded-md focus:border-white/30 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/30 text-[#EDEDED] placeholder:text-[#52525B]

surfaces_and_micro_themes.name: The Tracing Beam
surfaces_and_micro_themes.usage: High-conversion sections and feature bento grids in marketing.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.implementation: 1px border with a moving gradient mask, blur-md glow.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.name: Flat Dashboard Widgets
surfaces_and_micro_themes.usage: Analytics charts, student progress, AI scores.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.implementation: Strict 1px border-white/10, bg-[#050505], NO soft shadows, strictly utilitarian.

rules: Hover states: transform -translate-y-[2px], border color brightens, ultra-smooth ease-out 0.2s.
Page Load: Framer Motion staggered fade-in + slight slide-up (y: 20 -> 0) for lists/grids.
Micro-interactions: Buttons slightly scale down on click (scale: 0.98).

three_d_strategy.description: Minimalist interactive network nodes using 3D Points or InstancedMesh. Nodes connected by thin, low-opacity lines to represent AI connections and student-company matching. Deep black environment. Do not obscure hero text.

image_urls.description: Abstract minimalist 3D nodes on dark background, use as hero overlay or fallback pattern.
Subtle dark texture for deep backgrounds, reduce opacity to 10-15%.
Modern tech office thumbnail for company matching cards
Recruiter profile background or tech office setting

testing.data_testid_requirement: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST use kebab-case data-testid attributes indicating their role.
